com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.devicemanager

Interface ExtDeviceManager

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface ExtDeviceManager
extends Module
    [External Module] Provides some device related functions of external device, such as getting attributes, updating FW/App and so on.

    How to get this module:

         ExtDeviceManager extDeviceManager = (ExtDeviceManager)ExtNSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.EXT_DEVICE_MANAGER);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Gets battery percentage.
      BluetoothInfo getBluetoothInfo()
      Gets bluetooth info.

      Gets software version number of the external device.

      Replaced by update(UpdateFiles, UpdateListener).

    • Method Detail

      • getVersionNumber

        java.lang.String getVersionNumber()
                           throws NSDKException
        Gets software version number of the external device.
        Returns:
        Software version number of the external device.
        Throws:
        NSDKException - If error occurs.

      • getSerialNumber

        java.lang.String getSerialNumber()
                          throws NSDKException
        Gets the external PIN pad serial number.
        Returns:
        External PIN pad serial number.
        Throws:
        NSDKException - If error occurs.

      • setDeviceConfiguration

        void setDeviceConfiguration(DeviceConfiguration configuration)
                     throws NSDKException
        Loads configuration to the external device.

        Note: If the external device is connected via serial port, it will re-open the serial port after baud rate is set successfully.

        Example:

             // Load configuration with specified parameters.
     ExternalConfiguration configuration = new ExternalConfiguration();

     // Only baud rate mode supported now.
     configuration.setBaudRateMode(BaudRateMode.MODE_115200_8_N_1);

     try {
         extDeviceManager.setConfiguration(configuration);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception according to different exception types.
     }
        Parameters:
        configuration - [Required] Configuration to load. See DeviceConfiguration.
        Throws:
        NSDKException - If error occurs.

      • getDeviceConfiguration

        DeviceConfiguration getDeviceConfiguration()
                                    throws NSDKException
        Gets external configuration.
        Returns:
        External configuration. See DeviceConfiguration
        Throws:
        NSDKException - If error occurs.

      • loadFirmwareOrAppFile

        void loadFirmwareOrAppFile(java.lang.String appName,
                           byte[] data,
                           UpdateListener listener)
                    throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. Replaced by update(UpdateFiles, UpdateListener).
        Loads Firmware or app file to the external device.
        Parameters:
        appName - [Required] FW/App file name. Its length shall be <=12.
        data - [Required] FW/App file data.
        listener - [Required] Listener which will be called to give the result. See UpdateListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • updateFirmwareOrApp

        void updateFirmwareOrApp(java.lang.String appName,
                         boolean isReboot)
                  throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. Replaced by update(UpdateFiles, UpdateListener).
        Updates loaded firmware or app file.
        Parameters:
        appName - [Required] File name of FW/App file that loaded in external device.
        isReboot - [Required] Whether restart device after updating or not.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • reboot

        void reboot()
     throws NSDKException
        Reboots external device.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getBatteryPercentage

        int getBatteryPercentage()
                  throws NSDKException
        Gets battery percentage.
        Returns:
        Battery percentage.
        • 0: Charging
        • 1 - 100: Battery percentage
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getDeviceInfo

        ExtDeviceInfo getDeviceInfo()
                     throws NSDKException
        Gets device info.
        Returns:
        Device info, see ExtDeviceInfo.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setDatetime

        void setDatetime(java.lang.String datetime)
          throws NSDKException
        Sets device datetime.
        Parameters:
        datetime - [Required] Datetime. Format: YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getDatetime

        java.lang.String getDatetime()
                      throws NSDKException
        Gets device datetime.
        Returns:
        Datetime. Format: YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setBluetoothName

        void setBluetoothName(java.lang.String name)
               throws NSDKException
        Sets bluetooth name.

        Note: If bluetooth name is set successfully, bluetooth will be disconnected, so receiving timeout will occur.

        Example: 

             try {
         String btName = "MyBluetooth";
         extDeviceManager.setBluetoothName(btName);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         e.printStackTrace();
         showMessage("Please check the external device if bluetooth name is set successfully.");
     }
        Parameters:
        name - [Required] Bluetooth name to set. Max len: 21.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getBluetoothInfo

        BluetoothInfo getBluetoothInfo()
                        throws NSDKException
        Gets bluetooth info.
        Returns:
        Bluetooth info, see BluetoothInfo.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setConnectMode

        void setConnectMode(DeviceConnectMode mode)
             throws NSDKException
        Sets device connect mode.

        Note: Device will be disconnected if mode is changed and set successfully, so receiving timeout will occur.

        Example: 

             try {
         extDeviceManager.setConnectMode(DeviceConnectMode.USB);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         e.printStackTrace();
         showMessage("Please check the external device if connect mode is set successfully.");
     }
        Parameters:
        mode - [Required] Device connect mode, see DeviceConnectMode.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setLogoIcon

        void setLogoIcon(LogoType logoType,
                 byte[] data,
                 UpdateListener listener)
          throws NSDKException
        Sets logo icon.

        Example:

             AssetManager assetManager = context.getAssets();
     String iconPath = "iconfile";
     try {
         InputStream is = assetManager.open(iconPath);
         int length = is.available();
         byte[] buffer = new byte[length];
         is.read(buffer);
         is.close();
         extDeviceManager.setLogoIcon(LogoType.POWER_OFF_CHARGING, buffer, new UpdateListener() {
              @Override
             public void onError(int code, String message) {
                 // Handle error
             }
              @Override
             public void onFileTransferProgress(int percent) {
                 // Handle file transfer progress
             }
              @Override
             public void onComplete() {
                 // Setting is finished
             }
         });
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle error
     } catch (IOException e) {
         // Handle error
     }
        Parameters:
        logoType - [Required] Logo type. See LogoType.
        data - [Required] Icon data.
        listener - [Required] Listener which will be called to give the result. See UpdateListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setLanguage

        void setLanguage(byte[] language,
                 UpdateListener listener)
          throws NSDKException
        Sets language.

        Example:

             AssetManager assetManager = context.getAssets();
     String filePath = "language-en.xml";
     try {
         InputStream is = assetManager.open(filePath);
         int length = is.available();
         byte[] buffer = new byte[length];
         is.read(buffer);
         is.close();

         extDeviceManager.setLanguage(buffer, new UpdateListener() {
              @Override
             public void onError(int code, String message) {
                 // Handle error
             }
              @Override
             public void onFileTransferProgress(int percent) {
                 // Handle file transfer progress
             }
              @Override
             public void onComplete() {
                 // Setting is finished
             }
         });
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle error
     } catch (IOException e) {
         // Handle error
     }
        Parameters:
        language - [Required] Language file data.
        listener - [Required] Listener which will be called to give the result. See UpdateListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getLanguage

        java.lang.String getLanguage()
                      throws NSDKException
        Gets current language.
        Returns:
        Current language.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • update

        void update(UpdateFiles files,
            UpdateListener listener)
     throws NSDKException
        Transfers application/firmware to external device and starts update process.

        Example:

             AssetManager assetManager = context.getAssets();
     String appName = "mapp_ME30S_PinPad.NLP";
     // String firmwareName = "master_thm3682_me30su.NLP";
     try {
         InputStream is = assetManager.open(appName);
         int length = is.available();
         byte[] buffer = new byte[length];
         is.read(buffer);

         // is = assetManager.open(firmwareName);
         // length = is.available();
         // byte[] firmwareBuffer = new byte[length];
         // is.read(firmwareBuffer);

         is.close()

         UpdateFiles updateFiles = new UpdateFiles();
         updateFiles.setApplicationFile(buffer);
         // updateFiles.setFirmwareFile(firmwareBuffer);
         extDeviceManager.update(updateFiles, new UpdateListener() {
              @Override
             public void onError(int code, String message) {
                 // Handle error
             }

              @Override
             public void onFileTransferProgress(int percent) {
                 // Handle file transfer progress
             }

              @Override
             public void onComplete() {
                 // Update is started. Device will reboot while updating. Check the device to see if it is updated successfully.
             }
         });
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle error
     } catch (IOException e) {
         // Handle error
     }
        Parameters:
        files - [Required] Application and firmware files are supported.
        listener - [Required] Listener which will be called to give the result. See UpdateListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setTimeConfiguration

        void setTimeConfiguration(TimeConfiguration configuration)
                   throws NSDKException
        Sets time configuration.

        Example:

             try {
         TimeConfiguration configuration = new TimeConfiguration();
         configuration.setAutoBacklightOffTime(15);
         configuration.setAutoSleepTime(60);
         configuration.setAutoTurnOffTime(300);

         extDeviceManager.setTimeConfiguration(configuration);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle error
     }
        Parameters:
        configuration - [Required] Time configuration, see TimeConfiguration.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getTimeConfiguration

        TimeConfiguration getTimeConfiguration()
                                throws NSDKException
        Gets time configuration.
        Returns:
        Time configuration, see TimeConfiguration.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getFileList

        java.util.ArrayList<FileInfo> getFileList(java.lang.String keyword,
                                          byte[] tlvData)
                                   throws NSDKException
        Search the file information by the keyword in the pinpad
        Parameters:
        keyword - [Required] The keyword for searching the file information.
        tlvData - [Optional] This is reversed for the further use.
        Returns:
        The file information searched by the keyword, details see FileInfo.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
